title: Romantic Tender Italian Peas Frittata
description: A tangy and tender Italian dish featuring frozen peas and nuka-pickle, perfect for a romantic meal. This halal-friendly frittata is a delicious and unique twist on traditional Italian cuisine.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and a pinch of salt until well combined.
Add the thawed peas, chopped nuka-pickle, and shaved parmesan cheese to the bowl and stir gently.
Season with black pepper to taste.
Heat the olive oil in a 10-inch oven-safe skillet over medium heat.
Pour the egg mixture into the skillet and cook until the edges start to set.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the frittata is golden brown and set.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Slice the frittata into wedges and serve warm.
